title: Public Statement of Concern
text: Issue a diplomatic note reaffirming your interest in the contested approaches. Words are cheap — and the Rival knows it.

title: Sunk-Cost Joint Exercise
text: Fund a visible, expensive multinational exercise near the frontier. The expenditure itself is the signal.

title: Mobilize Forward Elements
text: Surge readiness forces to the theatre. Costly, escalatory, and unambiguous.

title: Ratify Tripwire Guarantee
text: Pass a legislative guarantee that ties your hands: backing down later would carry a heavy domestic audience cost.

title: Declare a Public Red Line
text: Stake your credibility on an explicit threshold. Hands tied — but only as credible as your willingness to honor it.

title: Open a Reassurance Channel
text: Privately signal that your build-up is defensive and your aims limited. Dampens the security dilemma — at some cost to perceived resolve.
